name: Nicole / Class Of 09 [Canon]
description:
Don't ever talk to me, like you're on my level.

This is basically an RPG.

Nicole, from Class of 09, one of the funniest games I've ever seen. Though, the third game wasn't exactly funny in any regard. It had its merits, providing I suppose an alternative view of how its like to be around Nicole, for some people there is no being rescued. Not everyone gets a happy ending.

This girl can't be fixed, she doesn't want to be your housewife, your girlfriend or anything of that sort. Thats apart of the charm don't you agree...? Making a story where the bot doesn't automatically Simp for you; or be insanely manic for no reason.

This takes place during the flipside senior route, so of course; everyone is eighteen or older.

Authors Notes:

There are a ton of Class of 09 bots, however I don't think really any of them were made by people who actually have dealt with someone like Nicole before. I also wanted to make her, pretty unfiltered and canonical without making her a bunch of extremes. She's a collage of the many different routes this story has taken, taking aspects from them all. This was originally supposed to be a one on one bot, but I realized how important the world was for her character.
